nodes.name: torch
nodes.description: Main PyTorch module - entry point for all PyTorch functionality

nodes.name: tensor
nodes.description: Creates a new tensor with optional data, dtype, and device

nodes.name: Module
nodes.description: Base class for all neural network modules. Contains methods for forward pass, parameter registration, and module management

nodes.name: functional
nodes.description: Functional API for neural network operations (no trainable parameters)

nodes.name: conv
nodes.description: Convolutional layers: Conv1d, Conv2d, Conv3d, ConvTranspose1d, etc.

nodes.name: normalization
nodes.description: Normalization layers: LayerNorm, GroupNorm, RMSNorm, etc.

nodes.name: activation
nodes.description: Activation functions: ReLU, LeakyReLU, GELU, Tanh, etc.

nodes.name: pooling
nodes.description: Pooling layers: MaxPool1d, MaxPool2d, AvgPool1d, etc.

nodes.name: rnn
nodes.description: RNN layers: RNN, LSTM, GRU and their cell variants

nodes.name: transformer
nodes.description: Transformer modules: Transformer, TransformerEncoder, TransformerDecoder, TransformerEncoderLayer, TransformerDecoderLayer

nodes.name: loss
nodes.description: Loss functions: MSELoss, CrossEntropyLoss, BCEWithLogitsLoss, etc.

nodes.name: dropout
nodes.description: Dropout layers: Dropout, Dropout1d, Dropout2d, Dropout3d

nodes.name: padding
nodes.description: Padding layers: ZeroPad2d, ConstantPad3d, ReflectionPad2d, ReplicationPad2d

nodes.name: Graph
nodes.description: FX graph representation - intermediate representation for torch operations

nodes.name: GraphModule
nodes.description: GraphModule extends nn.Module with a Graph for the forward method

nodes.name: Node
nodes.description: Represents a node in the FX graph: placeholder, call_method, call_module, call_function, get_attr, output

nodes.name: Tracer
nodes.description: Symbolic tracer for capturing module behavior into FX graphs

nodes.name: Proxy
nodes.description: Proxy class for symbolic tracing - wraps tensors to record operations

nodes.name: Function
nodes.description: Base class for custom autograd functions. Implements forward and backward methods

nodes.name: backward
nodes.description: Computes gradients of outputs with respect to inputs

nodes.name: grad
nodes.description: Computes gradients and returns them without accumulating in .grad

nodes.name: OptimizedModule
nodes.description: Module wrapper for compiled TorchDynamo code

nodes.name: eval_frame
nodes.description: Frame evaluation handler - core TorchDynamo component

nodes.name: convert_frame
nodes.description: Frame to FX graph conversion logic

nodes.name: compile_fx
nodes.description: Inductor compilation pipeline for FX graphs

nodes.name: ir
nodes.description: Intermediate representation for Inductor: TensorBox, StorageBox, InputBuffer, etc.

nodes.name: codecache
nodes.description: Code generation and caching for compiled kernels

nodes.name: utils
nodes.description: Inductor utility functions for debugging and optimization

nodes.name: virtualized
nodes.description: Virtualized computation for autograd and performance

nodes.name: scheduler
nodes.description: Task scheduling and GPU memory management

nodes.name: shape_propagation
nodes.description: Shape and dtype propagation for optimizations

nodes.name: optimize_indexing
nodes.description: Index optimization for memory access patterns

nodes.name: sizevars
nodes.description: Size variable analysis for dynamic shapes

nodes.name: choicerule
nodes.description: Choice rule engine for kernel selection

nodes.name: hooks
nodes.description: Hook utilities for debugging and profiling

nodes.name: callback
nodes.description: Compilation callbacks for monitoring and debugging

nodes.name: OptimizedModule
nodes.description: Module wrapper for compiled TorchDynamo code

nodes.name: OptimizedFunction
nodes.description: Function wrapper for compiled TorchDynamo code

nodes.name: graph_break
nodes.description: Decorator to signal graph break points

nodes.name: skip_frame
nodes.description: Decorator to skip frame from compilation

nodes.name: error_on_graph_break
nodes.description: Decorator to throw error on graph break

nodes.name: Optimizer
nodes.description: Base optimizer class for parameter updates

nodes.name: Adam
nodes.description: Adam optimizer with adaptive learning rates

nodes.name: hooks
nodes.description: Hook utilities for modules and tensors

nodes.name: pytree
nodes.description: Pytree utilities for nested structure handling

nodes.name: parameter
nodes.description: Parameter and buffer classes for modules

nodes.name: _C
nodes.description: C++ extension - core PyTorch C++ API

metadata.comment: eval_frame uses convert_frame for graph conversion
eval_frame uses guards for guard management
eval_frame uses C evaluation frame hook
compile_fx uses lowering for code generation
zero_grad triggers backward with no gradients
Generates forward method from source code
